content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Mr. Glazier: Inside Sales Manager Anywhere in the World New York Sales Management, Sales, Sales Pitching, and Sales Reporting Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5105/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> 979 3rd Avenue suite 815, New York NY 10022 <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://mrglazier.com/">https://mrglazier.com/</a> </p> <p class="f8 lh-relaxed mb5 mt0">Inside Sales Manager — (Inbound) for our cleaning department. Serving high-end private clients across South Florida and New York.</p><p class="f8 lh-relaxed mb5 mt0">We are hiring an Inside Sales Manager responsible for converting incoming leads into confirmed jobs and driving daily revenue. This is a high-speed, execution-driven role. You will handle a constant flow of inbound inquiries and are expected to respond fast, quote accurately, and close efficiently. Your goal: Turn every qualified lead into a booked job with maximum revenue.</p><p class="f8 lh-relaxed mb5 mt0">The work schedule is 10:00 AM — 6:00 PM (U.S. time) Monday through Friday.</p><h2 class="f7 fw6 grey-900 lh-relaxed mb3 mt7">What skills do you need:</h2><ul class="list listItem-marker mb6 mt0 pl0"><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Experience in sales or high-volume inbound lead conversion</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Strong closing and communication skills</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Ability to operate under speed and pressure</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">KPI-driven mindset</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">High ownership and discipline</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Organized and process-oriented</li></ul><h2 class="f7 fw6 grey-900 lh-relaxed mb3 mt7">What will you do:</h2><p class="f8 lh-relaxed mb5 mt0"><strong class="fw6">1. Primary Focus — Convert the Leads</strong></p><ul class="list listItem-marker mb6 mt0 pl0"><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Respond to inbound leads immediately (calls, SMS, forms)</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Close jobs with clear, confident communication</li></ul><p class="f8 lh-relaxed mb5 mt0"><strong class="fw6">2. Manage the full flow: Lead → Quote → Confirmation</strong></p><ul class="list listItem-marker mb6 mt0 pl0"><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Track and follow up on all active leads</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Re-engage warm and missed leads</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Maintain zero «forgotten» opportunities</li></ul><p class="f8 lh-relaxed mb5 mt0"><strong class="fw6">3. Prepare quotes aligned with job scope and company standards</strong></p><ul class="list listItem-marker mb6 mt0 pl0"><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Maximize revenue per booking without slowing down conversion</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Identify upsell opportunities when appropriate</li></ul><p class="f8 lh-relaxed mb5 mt0"><strong class="fw6">4. Maintain fast response time (target: immediate / within minutes)</strong></p><ul class="list listItem-marker mb6 mt0 pl0"><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Push for same-day bookings whenever possible</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Capture urgent and high-intent leads before they drop</li></ul><p class="f8 lh-relaxed mb5 mt0"><strong class="fw6">5. Coordinate with Operations</strong></p><ul class="list listItem-marker mb6 mt0 pl0"><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Work closely with Scheduling Manager to:<ul class="list listItem-marker mb6 mt0 pl0"><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Confirm availability in real time</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Secure cleaner allocation before confirming jobs</li></ul></li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Ensure smooth handoff from sale to execution</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Track all leads and outcomes in CRM</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Maintain accurate statuses: New / Quoted / Booked / Lost</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Identify reasons for lost leads</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Maintain clean and structured pipeline daily</li></ul><h2 class="f7 fw6 grey-900 lh-relaxed mb3 mt7">How to measure your success:</h2><ul class="list listItem-marker mb6 mt0 pl0"><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Lead-to-booking conversion rate</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Daily and monthly revenue</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Average ticket per job</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Response time (speed to lead)</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Same-day booking rate</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Lost lead rate and recovery</li></ul><h2 class="f7 fw6 grey-900 lh-relaxed mb3 mt7">Compensation</h2><ul class="list listItem-marker mb6 mt0 pl0"><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Base: $500/month</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Performance: $2,500 — $3,500+</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Total: $3,000 — $4,000+</li></ul><p class="f8 lh-relaxed mb5 mt0">Compensation is tied to:</p><ul class="list listItem-marker mb6 mt0 pl0"><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Revenue generated</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Conversion rate</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Booking volume</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Average ticket</li></ul><p class="f8 lh-relaxed mb5 mt0"><br></p><p class="f8 lh-relaxed mb5 mt0"><strong class="fw6">Additional:</strong></p><ul class="list listItem-marker mb6 mt0 pl0"><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Quarterly bonuses</li><li class="f8 lh-relaxed mb3 mt0">Yearly performance bonus</li></ul><p class="f8 lh-relaxed mb5 mt0">This role is built for speed, conversion, and revenue execution. You are not answering inquiries — you are closing business in real time.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/mr-glazier-inside-sales-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/mr-glazier-inside-sales-manager</a></p> Fri, 08 May 2026 14:49:42 +0000 Sun, 07 Jun 2026 14:49:42 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/mr-glazier-inside-sales-manager https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/mr-glazier-inside-sales-manager Iron House Studios: Creative Video Editor Anywhere in the World Colorado Video Editing and Video Editing (Final Cut Pro, Adobe Premiere) All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5094/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Cincinnati, Ohio <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.ironhousestudios.com/">https://www.ironhousestudios.com/</a> </p> <p><strong>COMPANY:</strong>&nbsp; Iron House Studios</p> <p><strong>STATUS:</strong>&nbsp; Independent contractor (1099)</p> <p><strong>
